name: Telegram MCP server
description: The server is a bridge between the Telegram API and the AI assistants and is based on the Model Context Protocol. It provides capabilities such as getting current account information, listing dialogs, marking dialogs as read, retrieving messages, and sending draft messages.

tools.name: tg_dialogs
tools.description: List dialogs with optional unread filter

tools.name: tg_send
tools.description: Send draft messages to any dialog

prompts.name: Message Management
prompts.description: Prompts for managing messages such as checking unread messages, summarizing, analyzing, and preparing draft responses.

prompts.name: Organization
prompts.description: Prompts for analyzing dialogs and suggesting folder structures or categorization.

prompts.name: Communication
prompts.description: Prompts for monitoring chats, drafting responses, and checking unanswered questions.
